title: Fix with clause handling in functions

features.name: array method with with clause in function
features.description: Code should include an array method with 'with' clause called from within a function body (e.g., find_index, find, find_first_index, sort with with clause in a function)

features.name: array method with with clause in static function
features.description: Code should include an array method with 'with' clause called from within a static function

features.name: array method with with clause in class method
features.description: Code should include an array method with 'with' clause called from within a class method (function inside class)

features.name: array sort with with clause in function
features.description: Code should include an array sort method with 'with' clause called from within a function
